text: Valves for gland steam seal system 1 no. of each type and size 9.2.8 Turning Gear i) Gear internal with shafts, bearing, bushes, lock washers, 1 set oil seals, ‘O’ rings ii) 25% nozzle segments and moving blades and complete 1 set set of sealing strips with caulking material (if hydraulically operated) 9.2.9 Turbine Governing and Protection System i) Hydraulic speed governor 1set (complete set of internals required to form one speed governor assembly except for outer casing) ii) Electro hydraulic converter for governing system 1set (complete set of internals required to form one convertor assembly except for outer casing) iii) Follow up pistons for governing system (complete 20% of each replacement in governing system of one turbine) type and size iv) Hydraulic amplifier for governing system (complete 1 set set of internals required to form one hydraulic amplifier assembly except for outer casing) v) Over speed trip testing device (complete set of internals 1 set required to form one device assembly except outer body) vi) Main trip valve assembly 1 no. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 32 vii) Release valve for main trip valve 1 no. viii) Bellow for accumulators in governing system 1 set (set comprising of complete replacement in one TG unit) ix) Emergency governor 1 no. x) Gear for loading device (complete set consisting of 1set gear for loading device and its motor and all other fixing/assembly materials except housing) xi) Gear for startup device (complete set consisting of bushes, spring, 1set motor and all other fixing/assembly materials except housing) 9.2.10 Turbine Lubricating Oil System i) Shaft driven main oil pump (complete set consisting of 1 set impeller, shaft, key, impeller nut, wear rings, journal bearings, thrust bearing, coupling, shaft sleeves, oil seals, ‘O’ rings as required for one pump) ii) Auxiliary oil pumps (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one TG unit) iii) DC emergency oil pump including motor (set comprising of 1 set pump or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirement of one TG unit) iv) Jacking oil pump including motor (set comprising of pump 1 set or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one TG unit) v) Transfer oil pumps (set comprising of pump or
